params.name: Washington Portrait
params.description:
The portrait of Washington was started by Stuart on January 28, 1796.
Washington is one of the most important figures in the history of the United States. He was not only a leader in the American Revolutionary War but also the first President of the United States, the Founding Father of the nation. He served as the Commander-in-Chief of the Continental Army during the American Revolutionary War. His political ideas and principles laid the foundation for the United States and still deeply infl …
